name: Fossil Excavation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>発</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>掘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by discarding 1 card, then target 1 Dinosaur-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. Negate the effects of that monster on the field. When this card leaves the field, destroy that monster. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.
eff: Activate this card by discarding 1 card, then target 1 Dinosaur-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. Negate the effects of that monster on the field. When this card leaves the field, destroy that monster. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 4: Joey's World Mega Pack

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
